summary: Iteration 13 — Backend-only verification of new features: (1) Notification settings/ringtones, (2) Facebook-style Chat (no BE changes required — covered by existing chat tests still green), (3) Gmail-based auto-emails (email_module wiring + template CRUD + AI generate + status when not connected), (4) Manual /api/email/send + role gating. Created /app/backend/tests/test_notif_email.py with 36 tests covering settings GET/PATCH + role gate + ringtones catalogue, /email/status returns connected:false, default-template auto-seed (8 slugs), template CRUD + 403 gating + default-template protection on DELETE, /email/templates/ai-generate (admin only — accepts 200 or 502; verifies no 500), /email/send returns 400 'Gmail not connected' for admin/manager/hr and 403 for member/intern, /email/log role gating, and event-hook safety tests asserting auth/register, task create, project create, issue create return no 5xx with Gmail off. Full regression: 202/202 pytest tests pass (166 prior + 36 new). Backend health: 100%. Gmail OAuth is NOT connected as expected — all event-email sends silently no-op (send_event_email returns None when db.email_tokens is empty).

minor.issue: Returns 200 'ok' even when the target is a default template that is NOT deleted (silently protected via is_default filter). Caller has no way to know the delete was a no-op; consider 403/409 with a clearer message.
On LLM error responds 502 with raw stringified exception; acceptable per request but consider trimming/structuring the error payload to avoid leaking internal stack details.

notification_settings.GET any role (admin/manager/hr/member/in: PASS — workspace doc returned with all 9 events seeded (task_assigned, project_assigned, issue_assigned, badge_awarded, document_verified, document_rejected, welcome_employee, welcome_intern, chat_mention)
notification_settings.PATCH admin updates default_ringtone/vol: PASS — persists and reflects in GET

email_status_and_templates.GET /email/templates auto-seeds 8 defaul: PASS — welcome_employee, welcome_intern, task_assigned, project_assigned, badge_awarded, issue_assigned, document_verified, document_rejected all present, no _id leaks
email_status_and_templates.DELETE default-template protection: PASS — default doc remains after DELETE (returns 200 ok)
email_status_and_templates.POST /email/templates/ai-generate admin: PASS — returned 200 with subject + body_html (category='ai') in this run; test accepts 200 OR 502, never 500

verification_results.regression: 202/202 pytest pass — backend_test (30), test_batch1 (11), test_batch23 (7), test_batch_certificate (9), test_chat_crossrole (12), test_extensions (30), test_issues_and_cert (20), test_notif_email (36 NEW), test_phase3 (23), test_phase4 (24).

action_items: (Optional) Make DELETE /api/email/templates/{id} return 403/409 when target is is_default=true instead of silent 200.
(Optional) Trim AI generation 502 payload to avoid leaking stack details to client.

Frontend testing for the 4 new UI surfaces (notification ringtone picker, FB-style chat shell, email template manager, per-entity Send-email button) was OUT OF SCOPE for this iteration — request explicit frontend round next.
critical_code_review_comments: notif_engine.send_event_email correctly no-ops when (a) event email channel disabled, (b) template slug not found, (c) email_tokens absent. Exception path is broad except → returns None & logs — safe for the 'must not 500 core endpoints' requirement.
notify() helper writes in-app notification first and only attempts email if variables is not None — good guard; callers should always pass `variables={...}` when an email is desired.

email_module._save_tokens has dead code: `doc_get_existing_from_name(db) if False else ''` — confusing leftover; safe but should be cleaned up. (Real reconnect-preservation is correctly handled in gmail_callback, not _save_tokens.)

email_module._do_send wraps Gmail API in try/except and re-raises as 502 — good. But /email/send endpoint correctly raises 400 *before* reaching _do_send when token missing, so admin/manager/hr get a clean 400 without Google client noise. Verified.
AI generation endpoint reads EMERGENT_LLM_KEY at request-time (not module-level) — fine. Uses with_model('openai','gpt-5.2'). If model name changes upstream, raises 502 — acceptable.

DELETE /email/templates/{tid} uses Mongo filter {id: tid, is_default: {$ne: True}}. Caller gets 200 even if nothing was deleted (default tpl). Consider returning {'ok': True, 'deleted': delete_result.deleted_count} or a 403/409.

Default template seeding (_seed_templates) runs on every GET /email/templates — idempotent via per-slug existence check, but adds 8 Mongo round-trips on every list call. Consider caching the 'seeded' flag in a workspace doc.

register_notif_settings.patch_notif_settings silently drops unknown ringtone keys (only writes if v in ALLOWED_RINGTONES). No explicit 400 for bad ringtone in the `ringtones` map — only the `default_ringtone` validates strictly. Minor inconsistency.
ALLOWED_RINGTONES includes 'none' — good for opt-out per event; verified via catalogue endpoint.

success_rate.frontend: N/A — out of scope this iteration

test_credentials: admin@projexino.com/Projexino@2026, manager@projexino.com/Manager@2026, hr@projexino.com/HR@2026, member@projexino.com/Member@2026, intern@projexino.com/Intern@2026 — all working.
seed_data_creation: Tests create one TEST_Template_X email template (created → patched → deleted in same suite), one TEST_Task_*, one TEST_Proj_*, one TEST_Issue_*, and one TEST_reg_*@projexino.com auth/register user per run. Tasks/projects/issues are deleted in the same test; the registered user remains (no DELETE-user endpoint exists). Notification settings are patched then restored to defaults in the test_patch_admin_updates teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported OR rely on _read_frontend_env() fallback (only test_notif_email.py and test_chat_crossrole.py have the fallback — test_phase3.py and test_issues_and_cert.py REQUIRE the env var). To run the full suite: `export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep '^REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=' /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) && python -m pytest backend/tests/`. Gmail OAuth remains disconnected; once admin runs OAuth flow, /api/email/send will move from 400 to 200/502; event hooks will then start producing real entries in db.email_log. Frontend surfaces for the 4 new features have NOT been tested — schedule a frontend round next.
rca of the issue: N/A — this iteration was a feature-verification round, not a bug fix. All 4 feature surfaces (notif settings, chat shell, email templates+send, manual send-email hooks) verified at the API layer with Gmail intentionally disconnected. notify()/send_event_email() correctly degrade to no-op so create_task/create_project/create_issue/award_badge/verify_document/auth_register stay 2xx even with no Gmail tokens, satisfying the 'must not 500 core endpoints' requirement.
